title: Remove epicgames-freegames from gatus
close_reason: Added gatus.home-operations.com/enabled: false annotation to epicgames-freegames HTTPRoute to exclude it from gatus monitoring

title: add RUBY_TCP_NO_FAST_FALLBACK to Manyfold
close_reason: disable Ruby 3.4 TCP fast fallback for manyfold

title: Add dragonflydb dependencies where missing
close_reason: add dragonfly-cluster dependency to apps using dragonfly

title: Address tdarr-node OOM issues
close_reason: Increased tdarr-node memory request from 256Mi to 512Mi and limit from 1Gi to 4Gi. The 1Gi limit was too low for GPU-accelerated video transcoding workloads.
